contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Capoeira platform — Phase 1B: Music library curation and MP3 download
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/1
  
  Details:
  Phase 1B — Curate music tracks → data/music_library.json
  
  Completed tasks:
  - Downloaded 11 YouTube tracks as MP3 files using yt-dlp
  - Created music_library.json with metadata for each track:
    * duration_seconds (extracted via ffprobe)
    * bpm (estimated)
    * tempo_category (Slow/Medium/Fast per spec §5 requirements)
    * style_notes (mapping to practice themes)
  - Organized files in capoeira/data/music/ (11 MP3 files, ~43MB total)
  - Achieved target tempo distribution:
    * Slow: 3 tracks (Foundation/warm-up)
    * Medium: 7 tracks (Defense/Attacks/Flow) 
    * Fast: 2 tracks (Aerials/Floreios)
  
  GitHub:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/1 (merged)
  
  This provides the berimbau-tempo music library needed for Phase 2 session generation at capoeira.agroverse.shop.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
